overview: Hook Sniffer is an AI-powered anti-phishing cybersecurity app with dark mode UI, real-time email threat detection, QR/URL scanning, and immediate threat alert modals. It features a 5-tab bottom navigation covering Home/Dashboard, Threat Scanner, Global Map, Analytics, and Profile with email linking.
features: Threat alert modal with phishing detection
Home dashboard with security score and live monitor status
URL, QR code, and email threat scanner
Zustand state management for real-time alert updates
Dark mode with neon green cybersecurity aesthetic
